sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to kill (cattle), Ex. 21:37 specially for food, 1Sa 25:11 Pro 9:2. As to killing in sacrifice, the cognate verb זָבַח is used, which see. (Eth. ጠብሐ፡ to kill, to cut the throat. Arab. طبغ to cook, to roast, compare אֲבַטִּיחִים.)

(2) to kill, to slay men, Psa 37:14 Lam 2:21 Eze 21:15.

Derivatives, מַטְבֵּחַ and the following words-
